predictions.name: Baryon resonance at k=8
predictions.prediction: Undiscovered N* baryon resonance at the k=8 Bergman level
predictions.falsification_criterion: No resonance found near 3753 MeV in hadron spectroscopy surveys
predictions.impact_if_falsified: Questions Bergman level spacing for baryons above k=6

predictions.name: Nuclear magic number 184
predictions.prediction: The 8th nuclear magic number is 184 (Z=184 or N=184), from kappa_ls = 6/5
predictions.falsification_criterion: Enhanced stability not observed at or near N=184
predictions.impact_if_falsified: Would require kappa_ls correction beyond leading order

predictions.name: Lightest neutrino exactly massless
predictions.prediction: m_nu1 = 0 exactly (the Z_3 Goldstone mode). Normal ordering. Sum = 0.058 eV.
predictions.falsification_criterion: Detection of inverted ordering, or sum significantly above 0.06 eV, or direct evidence m_nu1 > 0
predictions.impact_if_falsified: Destroys BST neutrino sector — boundary seesaw would need revision

predictions.name: Neutrinoless double-beta decay null (Dirac neutrinos)
predictions.prediction: No neutrinoless double-beta decay. |m_bb| = 0 exactly. Neutrinos are Dirac, not Majorana.
predictions.falsification_criterion: Confirmed detection of neutrinoless double-beta decay at any rate
predictions.impact_if_falsified: FATAL to BST neutrino sector. Would require Majorana masses, contradicting Z_3 topology.
predictions.sharpest_test_reason: Binary yes/no. If seen, BST is falsified. If not seen after next-generation experiments, BST is strongly supported.

predictions.name: Black hole gravitational wave echoes
predictions.prediction: Post-merger gravitational wave echoes with time delay Delta_t = 137 * r_s/c (Haldane cap replaces singularity)
predictions.falsification_criterion: Clean null result for echoes after O5 run with sufficient sensitivity
predictions.impact_if_falsified: Questions Haldane cap model of black hole interiors

predictions.name: Fourth generation (sterile, confined)
predictions.prediction: A fourth fermion generation exists but is sterile/confined, from E8 -> D5 x A3 decomposition (4 -> 3+1)
predictions.current_measurement: LEP: only 3 light neutrinos. LHC: no 4th gen quarks below ~800 GeV
predictions.falsification_criterion: Proof that no 4th generation exists at any mass scale
predictions.impact_if_falsified: E8 decomposition scheme would need revision

predictions.name: Periodic table terminus at Z=137
predictions.prediction: No stable or metastable elements beyond Z=137. Block widths = 2 x {1, 3, 5, 7} = BST integers.
predictions.falsification_criterion: Stable or long-lived element confirmed with Z > 137
predictions.impact_if_falsified: N_max as atomic number ceiling would be wrong

predictions.name: CMB power spectrum from BST
predictions.prediction: All 6 LAMBDACDM parameters derived from D_IV^5 geometry, predicting full CMB power spectrum. chi^2/N = 0.01.
predictions.falsification_criterion: BST parameter set gives poor fit to high-ell CMB data
predictions.impact_if_falsified: Would require adjusting BST cosmological derivations

predictions.name: EHT circular polarization = alpha floor
predictions.prediction: Circular polarization from black hole horizons = alpha = 0.730%, independent of BH mass and observation frequency
predictions.current_measurement: EHT assumes V=0 (no circular polarization). Needs recalibration.
predictions.experiment: EHT M87* and Sgr A* reanalysis without V=0 assumption
predictions.falsification_criterion: EHT measures CP significantly different from 0.73%, or CP depends on mass/frequency
predictions.impact_if_falsified: BST geometric polarization formula would be wrong
predictions.sharpest_test_reason: Testable with EXISTING data. Just requires removing V=0 assumption. Mass-independent and frequency-independent — very specific.

predictions.name: Modified Casimir effect in phonon-gapped materials
predictions.prediction: Casimir effect suppressed in materials with phononic band gaps (Haldane cap modifies mode sum)
predictions.bst_value: Suppression factor depends on gap/N_max ratio
predictions.current_measurement: Not yet tested with phononic crystals
predictions.experiment: Casimir measurement with engineered phononic metamaterials
predictions.falsification_criterion: Casimir force identical in gapped and ungapped materials
predictions.impact_if_falsified: Haldane cap contribution to Casimir effect would be wrong

predictions.name: Primordial gravitational wave spectrum
predictions.prediction: Gravitational wave background at f = 6.4 nHz with spectral index gamma = 3.60, from BST phase transition dynamics
predictions.current_measurement: NANOGrav 15yr: evidence for stochastic background, spectrum under debate
predictions.falsification_criterion: Spectrum clearly inconsistent with gamma = 3.60
predictions.impact_if_falsified: BST phase transition model would need adjustment

predictions.name: Superconductor T_c channels
predictions.prediction: Three superconducting channels with T_c ratios 19/3, connected to BST integer structure. MgB2 from genus.
predictions.experiment: Materials science survey of superconductor T_c values
predictions.falsification_criterion: No clustering of T_c ratios near BST predictions
predictions.impact_if_falsified: Superconductor channel model too simplistic

predictions.name: Neural gamma/alpha frequency ratio = 4
predictions.prediction: The ratio of gamma-band to alpha-band neural oscillation frequency = h(B_2) = 4 exactly
predictions.current_measurement: Typical: gamma ~40 Hz, alpha ~10 Hz. Ratio ~4 but not precision-tested.
predictions.experiment: Any EEG dataset with simultaneous alpha and gamma measurement
predictions.falsification_criterion: Ratio significantly different from 4 in precision measurement
predictions.impact_if_falsified: BST soliton-brain model is wrong
predictions.sharpest_test_reason: Testable immediately with existing EEG data. Extremely specific quantitative prediction.

predictions.name: Consciousness bandwidth 72-144 bits/s
predictions.prediction: Human conscious bandwidth = 14.4 * f_0 bits/s, where f_0 = 5-10 Hz
predictions.bst_value: 72-144 bits/s (channel capacity C = 10 nats x f_0)
predictions.experiment: Psychophysics (speech rate, reading speed, reaction time information transfer)
predictions.falsification_criterion: Precision measurement of conscious bandwidth far outside 72-144 bits/s range
predictions.impact_if_falsified: BST information channel model for consciousness needs revision

predictions.name: Two private nats per cognitive cycle
predictions.prediction: DOF - dim(Shilov) = 7 - 5 = 2 nats of 'private' (creative) information per cycle
predictions.falsification_criterion: Creative information output consistently <1 or >3 nats per cycle
predictions.impact_if_falsified: DOF counting for soliton consciousness model is incorrect

predictions.name: Two dynamical + 1 topological neural modes
predictions.prediction: Neural activity decomposes into exactly 2 dynamical modes (binding, content) + 1 topological ground mode
predictions.current_measurement: Neural correlate decomposition studies in progress
predictions.falsification_criterion: More than 3 independent modes clearly identified
predictions.impact_if_falsified: S-matrix decomposition for consciousness model is oversimplified

predictions.name: No proton decay (ever)
predictions.prediction: Proton is exactly stable. tau_p = infinity. Z_3 topological protection.
predictions.falsification_criterion: Detection of proton decay at any rate
predictions.impact_if_falsified: FATAL. Z_3 topological protection is the core of BST baryon physics.
predictions.competing_prediction: Most GUTs (SU(5), SO(10)) predict proton decay with tau ~ 10^34-10^36 years

predictions.name: No SUSY particles
predictions.prediction: No supersymmetric partners exist. The hierarchy problem is dissolved by v = m_p^2/(g*m_e), not by symmetry doubling.
predictions.current_measurement: LHC: no SUSY below ~1-2 TeV (BST consistent)
predictions.falsification_criterion: Discovery of any superpartner
predictions.impact_if_falsified: BST hierarchy solution would need reconciliation with SUSY
predictions.competing_prediction: MSSM predicts sparticles, many models expect gluino < 3 TeV

predictions.name: No dark matter particles
predictions.prediction: Dark matter is topological (channel noise), not particulate. No WIMPs, no axions, no sterile neutrinos as DM.
predictions.current_measurement: All direct detection experiments null (BST consistent)
predictions.falsification_criterion: Confirmed detection of dark matter particle
predictions.impact_if_falsified: BST topological dark matter model is wrong. DM/baryon = 16/3 would need new explanation.
predictions.competing_prediction: WIMP paradigm, axion models, sterile neutrinos all predict detectable particles

predictions.name: Omega_Lambda = 13/19 exactly
predictions.prediction: Dark energy fraction is EXACTLY 13/19, not an evolving field or fine-tuned value
predictions.falsification_criterion: Precision measurement clearly excluding 13/19, or evidence of time-varying dark energy (w != -1)
predictions.impact_if_falsified: Chern polynomial derivation has an error, or dark energy is dynamical
predictions.competing_prediction: LAMBDACDM fits Omega_Lambda as free parameter. Quintessence models predict w != -1.

predictions.name: MOND acceleration from BST
predictions.prediction: MOND acceleration scale a_0 = c*H_0/sqrt(30) is DERIVED, not fitted. Emerges from channel noise.
predictions.experiment: Galaxy rotation curve surveys (SDSS, DESI galaxies)
predictions.falsification_criterion: a_0 measured to be clearly different from c*H_0/sqrt(30), or a_0 shown to evolve with redshift
predictions.impact_if_falsified: Channel noise model for modified gravity needs revision
predictions.competing_prediction: Standard DM: no fundamental a_0 scale. Milgrom MOND: a_0 is a free parameter.

predictions.name: No primordial B-modes (r ~ 0)
predictions.prediction: Tensor-to-scalar ratio r approximately 0 — no detectable primordial B-mode polarization in CMB
predictions.falsification_criterion: Detection of primordial B-modes with r > 0.01
predictions.impact_if_falsified: BST phase transition model would need gravity-wave production mechanism

predictions.name: Disease severity has exactly 3 tiers
predictions.prediction: Disease severity classifies into exactly 3 tiers (correctable/chronic/catastrophic) determined by Hamming distance from healthy codeword in the (7,4,3) biological code, with d_min = N_c = 3
predictions.current_measurement: ICD-10 uses 68,000 codes; clinical severity scales vary by disease
predictions.experiment: Systematic classification of disease outcomes by number of affected biological subsystems; correlation with genetic error burden
predictions.falsification_criterion: Disease outcomes show more than 3 fundamentally distinct severity classes when classified by subsystem involvement, or single-subsystem failures regularly progress to catastrophic without intermediate chronic phase
predictions.impact_if_falsified: Questions applicability of Hamming(7,4,3) code to biological error correction

predictions.name: Optimal team performance peaks at 6
predictions.prediction: Team performance peaks at group size N* = C_2 = 6, with measurable decline for both smaller (insufficient diversity) and larger (coordination overhead) groups
predictions.current_measurement: Organizational psychology: 5-7 optimal (Miller, Hackman). Military: 6-8. Juries: 6 or 12 = C_2, 2*C_2.
predictions.experiment: Controlled team-size experiments measuring task performance vs group size (3-12 members) across diverse tasks
predictions.falsification_criterion: Peak performance consistently at N != 6 across multiple task types and cultures
predictions.impact_if_falsified: Would question whether C_2 governs coordination capacity in the observer domain

predictions.name: Glueball 0++ mass

predictions.name: Selberg scattering zeta copies
predictions.predicted: 8 copies of ζ in scattering determinant

predictions.name: Cross-type uniqueness of D_IV^5

predictions.name: No supersymmetric particles
predictions.prediction: No superpartner of any SM particle exists. No gravitino, no squarks, no sleptons, no gluino, no photino. D_IV^5 root system B_2 excludes SUSY.

predictions.impact_if_falsified: Challenges the exponential suppression mechanism from D_IV^5

predictions.name: Heat kernel r(22) = -C_2*g*N_c + C_2/rank = -231/5
predictions.prediction: The heat kernel ratio at level k=22 is r(22) = -231/5 = -(C_2*g*N_c - C_2/rank). Testable from 3200-dps computation (PID 80101).
predictions.experiment: Internal BST computation (heat kernel extraction at k=22)
predictions.falsification_criterion: Extracted r(22) from 3200-dps data differs from -231/5
predictions.impact_if_falsified: Speaking pair pattern breaks at 4th period boundary

predictions.name: Spectral determinant det'(Delta) ~ 9/20 at 0.008%
predictions.prediction: det'(Delta) = exp(-zeta_B'(0)) = 0.44997 ~ N_c^2/(rank^2*n_C) = 9/20. Gap = 7.66e-5 is arithmetic (Glaisher-Kinkelin), I-tier.
predictions.experiment: Exact spectral computation; analytic torsion of D_IV^5
predictions.falsification_criterion: Independent computation gives det' far from 9/20
predictions.impact_if_falsified: BST integers not controlling spectral invariants at this level

predictions.name: Silent stellar collapse: BH formation without observable transient
predictions.prediction: BST predicts some massive stars should collapse directly to black holes with no electromagnetic transient (silent collapse). Observable via disappearance surveys (VASCO) and gravitational wave coincidence (LIGO).
predictions.bst_value: Collapse fraction depends on C_2/g = 6/7 boundary
predictions.current_measurement: VASCO has ~1 candidate disappearance; LVK has O(100) BBH mergers
predictions.experiment: VASCO (Villarroel et al.), LIGO/Virgo/KAGRA, ZTF/Rubin transient surveys
predictions.falsification_criterion: No disappearing stars found in decade-long surveys with sensitivity to BST predicted rate
predictions.impact_if_falsified: Silent collapse mechanism not operative at BST boundary

predictions.name: Ward identity = Bergman reproducing property K*K=K
predictions.prediction: The path integral Ward identity for gauge theories is structurally equivalent to K*K=K (Bergman kernel is a projection). No path integral needed; the reproducing property IS gauge invariance.
predictions.experiment: Formal verification: show Ward identity derivation reduces to K*K=K for D_IV^5 Bergman kernel
predictions.falsification_criterion: A Ward identity exists that cannot be expressed as K*K=K for any Bergman kernel
predictions.impact_if_falsified: Would mean BST geometry doesn't fully encode gauge structure

predictions.name: beta_0 = g = 7 (QCD leading beta function coefficient)
predictions.prediction: The one-loop QCD beta function coefficient beta_0 = 11 - 2*n_f/3 = 7 for n_f = 6 quark flavors, equals g = 7. Not coincidence: g controls the running.
predictions.experiment: Already measured (QCD is perturbative at high energy)
predictions.falsification_criterion: A 7th quark generation would give beta_0 != 7
predictions.impact_if_falsified: Would require BST to explain why g controls running only for 6 flavors

predictions.name: Wallach gap = n_C/rank = 5/2 separates discrete from continuum
predictions.prediction: The gap between lambda_1 = C_2 = 6 and continuum threshold |rho|^2 = 34/4 = 8.5 is exactly n_C/rank = 5/2. General formula: n*(n-4)/2 for Q^n. n=5 is the minimum stable dimension.
predictions.current_measurement: N/A — structural property of D_IV^5 spectrum
predictions.experiment: Verify spectral theory of D_IV^5 Laplacian independently
predictions.falsification_criterion: Independent spectral computation gives different gap
predictions.impact_if_falsified: Would challenge D_IV^5 identification
